assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddInMemoryIdentityResources with at least IdentityResources.OpenId() and IdentityResources.Profile()
assertions.rationale: Standard IdentityServer configuration knowledge from tutorials.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddInMemoryApiScopes with a scope named 'weatherapi'
assertions.rationale: Standard API scope configuration from quickstart tutorials.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs defines a client with AllowedGrantTypes set to Code (authorization code with PKCE)
assertions.rationale: Authorization code with PKCE is well-known OAuth 2.0 configuration.

assertions.assertion: The client configuration includes RedirectUris containing 'https://webapp.example.com/signin-oidc' and PostLogoutRedirectUris containing 'https://webapp.example.com/signout-callback-oidc'
assertions.rationale: Redirect URIs are standard client configuration that an LLM would include when specified in the prompt.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs has the correct middleware pipeline ordering: UseIdentityServer after UseRouting and before UseAuthorization
assertions.rationale: Standard middleware ordering from IdentityServer4/Duende quickstart tutorials.
